summary: Karaoke-style subtitle component with word-by-word highlighting animation for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/subtitle-karaoke/src/SubtitleKaraoke.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SubtitleKaraoke` and `subtitleKaraokeDefaultProps`, then register the `SubtitleKaraoke` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Subtitle Karaoke Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/subtitle-karaoke to my project. Preserve the exported SubtitleKaraokeProps API and register the SubtitleKaraoke composition with the default props.
